title: microsorum normale
intro: Microsorum normale, also known as the 'Java fern', is a type of epiphytic aquatic plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Microsorum normale include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce oxidative stress and improve overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Microsorum normale is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential health benefits.
